about.title: About
about.contextFirstParagraph: Hi, I'm Matěj Klíma — a Software Engineering student at the Faculty of Informatics, Masaryk University in Brno.
about.contextSecondParagraph: My main interests in tech are backend development, GitOps, and AI. I also recently started participating in teaching at the faculty.
about.contextThirdParagraph: Outside of IT, I play saxophone and enjoy canoeing. I help out at a local canoeing club working with children.
about.contextFourthParagraph: This portfolio is built as a Windows XP desktop simulator — a fun and interactive way to present myself beyond a typical resume page.
about.helpFirst: This project is a fork of PortfolioXP by Paul Jaguin (github.com/UnMugViolet/portfolio), built with Vue.js, Vue Router, Pinia, and SCSS.
about.helpSecond: The Windows XP design, icons, wallpapers, and sounds belong to Microsoft. The original web implementation was created by Paul Jaguin.
about.helpThird: Windows XP assets were recovered thanks to the Internet Archive.
about.helpFourth: The Dockurr Windows XP Docker image was helpful as a reference for the original author.

legal.title: Attribution & Legal

legal.secondParagraph: The original site, accessible at the URL https://pauljaguin.com (the original « Site »), was edited by:
legal.thirdParagraph: Paul Jaguin, residing at 202 Boulevard de Charonne, 75020 PARIS, of French nationality (France), born on 09/23/1999.
legal.fourthParagraph: The original site is hosted by Infomaniak Network SA, which can be contacted at the following address: https://www.infomaniak.com/en/help
legal.fifthParagraph: The Publication Director of the original site is: Paul Jaguin.
legal.sixthParagraph: For any questions about this fork, you can reach the current maintainer at:

trainMeMaybe.contextFirstParagraph: Train me maybe is a watchdog service for RegioJet, the popular Czech train and bus operator. It monitors selected routes and notifies you as soon as free seats become available in your chosen tariff class.
trainMeMaybe.contextSecondParagraph: Beyond simple notifications, the tool can automatically purchase tickets on your behalf the moment availability is detected — saving you from constantly refreshing the booking page during peak travel times.
trainMeMaybe.contextThirdParagraph: The service is deployed and publicly accessible at vyhul.me, ready for anyone who wants a hassle-free way to snag those hard-to-get train seats.
trainMeMaybe.goalFirst: Monitor RegioJet routes for seat availability in real time
trainMeMaybe.goalSecond: Send instant notifications when free seats appear
trainMeMaybe.goalThird: Automatically purchase tickets when availability is detected
trainMeMaybe.goalFourth: Provide a simple, self-hosted deployment for anyone to use

remembeer.contextFirstParagraph: Remembeer is a mobile application designed for tracking your alcoholic drinks consumption over time. Whether it's a casual evening out or a weekend celebration, Remembeer helps you keep a log of what you drink and when.
remembeer.contextSecondParagraph: The app includes social features that let you compete with friends, compare drinking stats, and share memorable moments from wild evenings — turning an ordinary night out into a friendly competition.
remembeer.contextThirdParagraph: This project is currently a work in progress, with new features and improvements being actively developed.
remembeer.goalFirst: Track alcoholic drinks consumption with an intuitive mobile interface
remembeer.goalSecond: Compete with friends through leaderboards and challenges
remembeer.goalThird: Share memories and photos from social events
remembeer.goalFourth: Provide insightful statistics about drinking habits over time
